---
title: "Media"
pagetitle: "Media — Martin Lukk"
subtitle: "Press, podcasts, and other public-facing appearances."
listing:
  contents: "../news/[0-9]*.qmd"
  type: custom
  template: ../_templates/media-list.ejs
  sort: "date desc"
  page-size: 100
  fields: [date, title, news_title, categories, outlet, outlet_url, hide_in_news]
---

::: {#listing-listing}
:::
